prompt: I'm upgrading my Blazor Server app from MudBlazor 8 to MudBlazor 9. The file at /Users/dejanwho/Projects/Code/mudblazor-skills/mudblazor-migration-8-to-9/evals/fixtures/eval-1-chart/Dashboard.razor uses MudChart with the v8 API (InputData / XAxisLabels / MudTimeSeriesChart). Please update it to use the v9 chart API so it builds against MudBlazor 9.3.0.

assertions.text: Dashboard.razor no longer uses the v8 'InputData' parameter on MudChart
Dashboard.razor no longer uses the v8 'XAxisLabels' parameter (uses ChartLabels instead)
Dashboard.razor no longer uses the v8 'InputLabels' parameter (uses ChartLabels instead)
Dashboard.razor no longer uses the removed <MudTimeSeriesChart> component (uses MudChart with ChartType.TimeSeries)
Dashboard.razor uses the typed ChartSeries<T> generic for chart data (e.g., ChartSeries<double>)
Dashboard.razor uses BarChartOptions (or similar type-specific options class) instead of the old generic ChartOptions for the bar chart
Dashboard.razor wraps chart data with .AsChartDataSet() (the v9 helper for converting arrays to ChartDataSet)
Dashboard.razor preserves the @page "/dashboard" route from the original file
